column7: They have Bol-Mor's "Z4." really good q! not many companies that make the candlepin part we need. the best way is to scavenge from other candlepin alleys. wubourn bolodrome recently closed -- general manager has the in with a lot of different houses, so he knew the owner of wouborn and was able to get some stuff. they get anything they can. sometimes the switches don't work well, so a lot of the hard machinery they transfer. only 2 big companies that would build the candlepin setters. Bol-mor and AMF.
